title: eucalyptus pyriformis var. rameliana
intro: Eucalyptus pyriformis var. rameliana, also known as Lemon-Scented Gum, is a variety of the Eucalyptus pyriformis tree native to Australia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and colds. The health benefits of Eucalyptus pyriformis var. rameliana include relieving coughs, reducing fever, and easing congestion, due to its expectorant and decongestant properties. Eucalyptus pyriformis var. rameliana can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and topical creams for various health benefits.
